message.content:
1. CONTENT TYPE: Icon/graphic only  
2. TEXT: NO TEXT  
3. COLORS: White (#FFFFFF)  
4. BACKGROUND: Transparent  
5. DESCRIPTION: The watermark features a stylized white graphic resembling a crescent moon with a triangular play button at its center and a small diamond shape at the top of the crescent’s curve. The graphic is centered on a transparent background, with no text present.
